summary: This checkpoint makes a small source-level improvement to the W1450 frontier. The W944 target no-univ leaf now has a named constructor, targetNoUnivDataOfPrimitiveProvidersW944, which assembles TargetSurjectiveNoUnivMembershipForTargetProviderW944 from the two real lower primitive provider families targetDifferenceSurjectivePrimitiveW923 and targetCodomainCompactNoUnivMembershipPrimitiveW930. The focused probe shows that a nullary W944 provider now stops exactly at those two primitive goals. This is not product success: W1625 still consumes caller-supplied W987 full data, and the original four mathematical deliverables do not yet have a nullary positive witness.
obligations_discharged: Added Lean source constructor Dbounded.targetNoUnivDataOfPrimitiveProvidersW944 in the existing W944 module.
Eliminated W944 as an opaque immediate W1450 leaf for the inspected path by deriving it from two explicit primitive provider families.
Verified the edited W944 module, rebuilt the project, and recorded an expected-failure probe that narrows nullary W944 construction to the two primitive provider goals.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: The previous W1450 leaf TargetSurjectiveNoUnivMembershipForTargetProviderW944 is now derived from targetDifferenceSurjectivePrimitiveW923 and targetCodomainCompactNoUnivMembershipPrimitiveW930 providers.
The W984 branch still also requires ClosedEmbeddingClosednessDataProviderW973.
The remaining W1450 frontier keeps the other seven immediate leaves from the W1450 report, replacing W944 with the two lower primitive provider families.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.

The original four-task contract is not complete because the W1625 product-data path still requires caller-supplied BoundaryRelationTargetClosedEmbeddingClosednessNormalizedSourceEndpointLocalizedUnitFullDataProviderW987 data.

No nullary W987 full-data provider, W1450 field-data input, W716 boundary-data provider, W717 relation-data provider, W984 target/closedness provider, or W950 normalized-source/endpoint-localized-unit provider was found in current source.

The W944 target no-univ provider now has a source constructor, but no nullary provider exists for targetDifferenceSurjectivePrimitiveW923 over arbitrary target diagrams or targetCodomainCompactNoUnivMembershipPrimitiveW930 over arbitrary target diagrams.

No nullary provider was constructed for ClosedEmbeddingClosednessDataProviderW973, NormalizedFixedTargetSourceTriangulationDataProviderW948, EndpointStrictExactLocalizedUnitDataProviderW949, either W716 boundary leaf, or either W717 relation leaf.
Typeclass synthesis still does not provide Pretriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA) or IsTriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA).
Typeclass synthesis still does not provide (boundedExactWeakEquivalence MetrizableLCA).HasLeftCalculusOfFractions.
remaining_work: Prove or replace the two lower W944 primitive provider families with mathematically honest target-diagram hypotheses; the current arbitrary-target statements are still not a nullary product path.
Construct the other immediate W1450 leaves from actual mathematical source declarations, or prove a stronger canonical theorem that eliminates the W1450/W987 provider entirely.
Use the resulting leaves to construct W987FieldDataConstructionInputW1450 and then a nullary BoundaryRelationTargetClosedEmbeddingClosednessNormalizedSourceEndpointLocalizedUnitFullDataProviderW987.
Use the resulting nullary source data to build the bounded-derived stable package and original four-task positive witness.
Run the Tier C review packet and full contract audit before permitting update_goal complete.
